data.title: Nokia Accelerates Share Buyback Program
data.description:
Nokia (GB:0HAF) has released an update.

Nokia Oyj has actively bought back its shares on October 10, 2024, spending a total of 7.966 million euros as part of a share repurchase program designed to return up to 600 million euros to shareholders over two years. The accelerated repurchase plan, following regulatory compliance and a mandate from the annual general meeting, has increased the number of shares to be acquired in 2024. Following these recent acquisitions, Nokia now holds 163,555,435 of its own shares.

For further insights into GB:0HAF stock, check out TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.
data.author: TipRanks UK Auto-Generated Newsdesk

data.title: Abcourt Mines Secures $1.25M for Gold Project Growth
data.description:
Abcourt Mines (TSE:ABI) has released an update.

Abcourt Mines Inc. successfully completed a non-brokered private placement, raising $1.25 million through the issuance of over 20 million units that include shares and warrants. The funds will be directed towards the development and exploration of the Sleeping Giant Gold Project in Quebec. The investment by NQ Investissement Minier highlights the project’s potential and marks a significant vote of confidence in Abcourt’s future.

For further insights into TSE:ABI stock, check out TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Bit Digital Shareholders Approve Key Proposals
data.description:
Bit Digital (BTBT) has released an update.

Bit Digital, Inc. successfully conducted its 2024 Annual Meeting of Shareholders on October 2, 2024, after a previous adjournment due to lack of quorum. Shareholders voted on three key proposals, including the election of five directors, the adoption of amended and restated articles of association, and the ratification of the company’s independent registered public accounting firm. All proposals passed with a high majority, showcasing shareholder confidence and active participation in the company’s governance.

For further insights into BTBT stock, check out TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: RIV Capital & Cansortium Merger Gets Green Light
data.description:
RIV Capital (TSE:RIV) has released an update.

RIV Capital Inc. and Cansortium Inc. have received approval from the New York Cannabis Control Board for their business combination, with expected closure in Q4 of 2024. This merger aims to create a leading multistate cannabis platform, leveraging RIV’s current momentum from adult-use sales and Cansortium’s medical program expertise to meet the rising demand in New York.

For further insights into TSE:RIV stock, check out TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Vidrala S.A. Schedules Q3 2024 Results and Conference
data.description:
Vidrala (ES:VID) has released an update.

Vidrala S.A. has announced that it will publish its interim management statement for the third quarter of 2024 on October 25, 2024, before the market opens. Following the release, a telephone/webcast conference will be held to discuss the results. Investors and analysts are encouraged to consult the company’s website for supporting documents and connect to the conference using provided registration links.

For further insights into ES:VID stock, check out TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Liberty Media Q3 Financial Results Conference Call Announcement
data.description:
Liberty Media Liberty Formula One ( (FWONA) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Liberty Media Corporation is set to discuss its third-quarter financial results for 2024 on November 7th in a conference call scheduled for 10:00 a.m. ET. This call will address the company’s financial performance, future prospects, and other matters of interest to investors and stakeholders. Prior to the market opening on the same day, the company will release these results in a press statement. Interested parties can access the live broadcast of the conference call on Liberty Media’s website, with a replay and press release also available post-event. Liberty Media, known for its broad portfolio in media, communications, and entertainment, operates under two tracking stock groups: the Formula One Group and the Liberty Live Group.

Find detailed analytics on FWONA stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Miata Metals Boosts Private Placement to Fund Exploration
data.description:
Miata Metals Corp. (TSE:MMET) has released an update.

Miata Metals Corp. has increased its private placement offering to $6.37 million, aiming to fund its exploratory and development efforts in mineral properties. The offering consists of over 10 million units, each including a common share and a half warrant, with the latter allowing additional share purchases at a set price. Scheduled to close in mid-October, this initiative is backed by experienced lead agents and will prioritize the company’s exploration program and general corporate needs.

For further insights into TSE:MMET stock, check out TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Liberty TripAdvisor Hosts Post-Earnings Q&A Session
data.description:
Liberty TripAdvisor Holdings ( (LTRPA) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Liberty TripAdvisor Holdings, Inc. invites shareholders and analysts to a Q&A session following Liberty Broadband Corporation’s Q3 earnings call on November 7th. This call will allow participants to ask questions about both companies and hear management’s discussion on financial performance and future outlook. Interested parties can join via phone or live internet broadcast, with a replay available on the Liberty TripAdvisor website post-call.

data.title: Qurate Retail Group’s Q3 Earnings Call Scheduled
data.description:
Qurate Retail Group ( (QRTEA) ) has shared an update.

Qurate Retail, Inc. is set to discuss its third-quarter financial results for 2024 in a conference call on November 7th. data.title: Morguard Launches Eco-Friendly Rental Project in Mississauga
data.description:
Morguard (OTC) (TSE:MRC) has released an update.

Morguard Corporation has initiated the construction of a new eco-conscious rental community in Mississauga’s bustling Port Credit area, featuring 431 units ranging from studios to three-bedroom suites and townhomes. The project emphasizes a blend of modern living and nature, offering amenities like a greenhouse, rooftop terraces, and co-working spaces. This development aims to cater to the lifestyle needs of young professionals, families, and downsizing couples.

For further insights into TSE:MRC stock, check out TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.
